title: Required Documents
description: Passport, OCI and other paperwork Indian travellers need before departure.

items.title: Passport
items.description: Must be valid for at least 3 months beyond your planned departure from the Schengen area, issued within the last 10 years, with at least 2 blank pages.
tips: Carry a photocopy and a digital scan separate from the original

items.title: OCI (Overseas Citizen of India)
items.description: Persons of Indian origin who have taken foreign citizenship can apply for an OCI card, which functions as a lifelong multi-entry visa to India.
steps: Apply online via the OCI portal
Submit supporting documents (proof of prior Indian citizenship or descent)
Attend biometrics/verification if required by your jurisdiction

items.title: PAN / Address Proof
items.description: Useful to retain for financial and tax purposes back in India, especially if you'll continue to have Indian income or investments.
tips: Keep digital copies accessible from abroad
